text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Mainichi Okan, where Grass
Wonder is set to face both Silence Suzuka and El
Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The showdown of the century against the
Otherworldly Front-Runner and the Phantom Bird.
This is Grass Wonder's chance to surpass them
both.
